title: Repurposed Structures - Create: Dynamic Village Compat
description: Makes Dynamic Village's buildings spawn in RS villages
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Create: Dynamic Village. You will find their buildings with Create blocks in RS's Overworld Villages!

- Create: Dynamic Village mod can be obtained from here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-village](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-village)

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge)


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7qg8vRBh/images/d44065958af98fbaa349667f336d420740adbaca.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7qg8vRBh/images/d44065958af98fbaa349667f336d420740adbaca.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
